name: Voting Engagement
summary: Rewards voters who spread their ratings across the full range (skip through 10) rather than repeatedly selecting the same value — normalized to a 0–1 score per voter.
description:
### What it measures
Measures how varied each voter's answers are across the available rating options.

### How scoring works
- Using a broad spread of different ratings raises the score.
- Repeatedly selecting the same rating lowers the score.
- The final score is normalized to the 0–1 range.
- The algorithm measures diversity only — it does not judge whether any individual rating is correct.

### Required input
Upload one CSV file where each row represents a single vote. Votes are grouped by `collection_id` (voter identifier).

Rows are skipped when `collection_id`, `question_id`, or `answer` is missing, or when `answer` is not `skip` or `1` through `10`.

### Output files
- A per-voter CSV with `collection_id` and `voting_engagement`.
- A JSON details file with vote distributions and row-processing statistics.

inputs.label: Vote History (CSV)
inputs.description: Upload a CSV of votes. Each row must include a voter ID (`collection_id`), a question or proposal ID (`question_id`), and an `answer` of `skip` or `1` through `10`.

columns.description: The voter's rating — `skip` to abstain, or `1` through `10`
Optional timestamp when the vote was cast
Optional timestamp when the vote was last updated
Identifier of the proposal or question being voted on
Optional balance recorded alongside the vote
Optional stake recorded alongside the vote
Voter identifier — all votes sharing this value are grouped together
Optional unique identifier for the vote record

outputs.label: Voting Engagement (CSV)
outputs.description: One row per voter with columns: `collection_id` and `voting_engagement` (score in the 0–1 range).

columns.description: Vote diversity score, normalized to the 0–1 range

outputs.label: Voting Engagement Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Per-voter vote distributions and row-processing statistics, useful for auditing results.
